title: Maniac's Adventure
description: A Minecraft modpack focused on performance, graphic enhancements and good-to-have features.
body:
A Minecraft modpack focused on performance, graphic enhancements and good-to-have features.

![General HUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2017d424d2cd23fc732008ae0b7784accbe13a97.png)

- **Better Hud**
   - Better F3 Menu
   - Improved Hunger Bar (AppleSkin)
   - Minimap
   - Better Mount HUD
   - Simple Armor Display
- **Improvements to Menus**
   - Inventory Move
   - Lock Important Items
   - Shulker Box View
   - Map View
   - Search Items Easily (Just Enough Items)
   - Tool Stats
   - Important Item Borders
   - Favorite Worlds and Servers
   - Seamless World Loading Transition
   - In-depth Steps to Advancements
   - Better Statistics Screen
   - Persistent Search (Creative Menu)
   - Show Operator Items (Creative Menu)
   - Dark Loading Screen
   - No Fade in Loading Screen
   - Blurred Background (when focused on a menu)
   - Enchantment Descriptions
- **Performance & Shaders**
   - Sodium
   - Reduce minecraft usage while in the background/idle.
   - Indium
   - Iris Shaders
   - Fast World Quit
   - Hide Entities while not visible
- **Visual and Audio Enhancements**
   - 3D Skin Layers
   - Clump XP Orbs
   - Falling Leaves
   - Fast Villager Trading
   - Mouse Tweaks (also utilizes the Wheel Scroll)
   - Footstep Sounds
   - Sound Physics
- **Other**
   - Controller Support
